En: A large table with two huge vacuum-insulated thermal coffee dispensers. Someone has forgotten a small plastic card next to the stacks of cups.
Zh: 一张大桌子上放着两台巨大的真空隔热咖啡贩售机。有人把一张小塑料卡片落在了茶杯旁边。

En: Pick up the card.
Zh: 捡起卡片。

En: [Leave.]
Zh: [离开。]

En: You snatch up the red plastic card. It features a black contour of a crane lifting a container. The name 'Etienne Hogarth' is written in the middle, below it in smaller text: 'Member of the board'. It comes with a magnetic strip -- meant to open electronic doors.
Zh: 你一把抓起那张红色的塑料卡片。上面印着吊车抬起集装箱的黑色图案。中间写着“艾蒂安·贺加斯”，下面有一小行字：*董事会成员*。卡上还有一个磁条——应该是用来打开电子门的。

En: Look into one of the old coffee cups.
Zh: 看向其中一只旧咖啡杯。

En: Peer into a discarded coffee cup!
Zh: 盯着一只废弃的咖啡杯！

En: You see nothing exceptional. It's a dirty cup, smudged brown, with old ground coffee stuck to the bottom... slowly getting mouldy.
Zh: 你没发现什么异常。不过是一只布满棕色污渍的脏咖啡杯，杯底还粘着些陈年的咖啡渣……正在慢慢变霉。

En: What am I supposed to see here?
Zh: 我应该在这里看到些什么？

En: Huh, okay. Thanks, this certainly wasn't a waste of time.
Zh: 好吧，谢了。这确实不是浪费时间。

En: You throw the cup back into the trash bin.
Zh: 你把杯子又扔回了垃圾箱。

En: Look closer!
Zh: 再仔细看看！

En: If you squint your eyes enough the coffee grounds almost seem to make up two letters: F... and K.
Zh: 如果眯着眼睛看的话，那些咖啡渣好像组成了两个字母：F……还有K。

En: Yeah. Of course. It's certainly not just an example of *paréidolie*, noticing patterns in noise. Worth it.
Zh: 没错，当然了。在聒噪的环境下注意到这个图案，肯定不只是*错觉*的案例。值了。

En: It's a clue!
Zh: 这是一条线索！

En: A clue of what?
Zh: 什么线索？

En: A clue about the person behind all the murders.
Zh: 所有凶杀案幕后黑手的线索！

En: It's meaningful, I *swear*! You just wait... I've got the case nearly busted wide open.
Zh: 绝对是有什么特殊意义的，我敢*发誓*！你就等着吧……我很快就能破获这个案子。

En: Uh-huh, great. I somehow doubt old coffee is how the police solve investigations.
Zh: 啊哈，太好了。我是有点怀疑，警察应该不是靠这些陈年咖啡渣破案的吧。

En: It *is* a sign! Just like a remote viewer would operate. Signs hidden inside the mundane...
Zh: 这*绝对*是某种象征！遥视者也会这样做的。隐藏在世俗之间的征兆……

En: You got it, pal. I would *never* make such a thing up.
Zh: 你说的没错，伙计。换做是我，*永远*也编不出这种东西。

En: If you can't trust your own eyes, who can you trust...
Zh: 如果连自己的眼睛都信不过，那还能相信什么……

En: You would be correct.
Zh: 也许你是对的。

En: If you can't trust your own eyes, who can you trust? Certainly not Kim. He's so... suspicious.
Zh: 如果连自己的眼睛都信不过，那还能相信谁？反正肯定不能相信金。他实在是……太可疑了。
